introduction: In the hands of Mityay, a school geography teacher from Sochi, is not just a talking, but an intelligent parrot from an ancient family. His name is Innokenty - or simply Kesha for his friends. The parrot ends up with Mityay at a difficult moment in his life - his girlfriend Lera puts the relationship on pause. She wants a luxurious life, but Mityay cannot provide it for her. But maybe a parrot. More precisely, he can "pump up" Mityay so that he starts earning a lot. New friends make an agreement - Kesha will help return Mityay to Lera, and Mityay will help the parrot find and return his beloved, from whom they were separated.
